vocab.meaning: vấn đề của sự uy nghiêm/phong thái chững chạc
vocab.example: In a corporate setting, wearing a classic timepiece is a matter of gravitas, signaling that the wearer takes their role seriously.

vocab.meaning: sự mệt mỏi/chán ngán do lệ thuộc vào công nghệ
vocab.example: Many people are returning to analog watches due to technological fatigue from being constantly tethered to smartphones.

vocab.meaning: thiên hướng/sự đam mê đối với sự chính xác tuyệt đối
vocab.example: Engineers often wear mechanical watches as it mirrors their personal vocation for precision and fine craftsmanship.

vocab.meaning: né tránh những tác nhân gây xao nhãng
vocab.example: A wristwatch allows me to circumvent distractions such as social media notifications that inevitably appear when checking the time on a phone.

vocab.meaning: cho thấy/chứng tỏ sự trưởng thành
vocab.example: The decision to invest in a quality watch often bespeaks maturity and a transition into a more organized phase of life.

vocab.meaning: kỷ luật về mặt thời gian
vocab.example: Wearing a watch fosters a sense of chronological discipline, making it much easier to stick to a tight daily itinerary.

vocab.meaning: sự kết nối/nhận thức ổn định về không gian và thời gian
vocab.example: Having a permanent fixture on the wrist provides better spatial and temporal grounding than digging through a bag for a mobile device.

vocab.meaning: những tiêu chuẩn khắt khe/tỉ mỉ
vocab.example: High-end watchmakers adhere to exacting standards, which appeals to individuals who value excellence in every detail of their attire.

vocab.meaning: củng cố quyết tâm (về việc quản lý giờ giấc)
vocab.example: A quick glance at my wrist helps fortify my resolve to stay productive and meet my upcoming deadlines.

vocab.meaning: sức hút từ sự cổ điển/ngược dòng thời gian
vocab.example: I find that mechanical watches have an anachronistic appeal that makes them much more soul-stirring than mass-produced digital gadgets.
